summary: Tested Zantia Formação training app (Expo RN + FastAPI + MongoDB). Backend: 8/8 pytest pass (gavetoes list + counts 11/7/3/9/1, single gavetão, single gavetinha, PUT updates persist for description/videos/images, no _id leakage, proper 404s). Frontend: Home hero 'Energia & Climatização' + 5 category cards with correct counts, CTA navigates to g1, gavetão /gavetao/g1 shows 11 gavetinhas + Fotovoltaico banner, gavetinha detail opens, edit → set description + add YouTube URL → save → persists across reload, YouTube iframe renders, back buttons work. All happy-path flows operate correctly.

issues: RN Image style.resizeMode deprecation warning in expo logs (cosmetic, non-blocking)

react_native_issues.issue: Installed 55.0.19 but expected ~17.0.11 for current Expo SDK per warning in expo.err.log. Non-blocking for web but may break native builds.

action_items: Consider aligning expo-image-picker version with current Expo SDK (warning only; web testing was unaffected as image picker path was not exercised).
Optional: update <Image resizeMode> usage to prop form to silence deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: clean, uses {'_id': 0} projection consistently — no ObjectId leakage.
gavetinha PUT accepts partial updates via Optional fields and sets updated_at — good.
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL via src/theme.ts (API_URL), no hardcoded URLs in screens.
All interactive elements have testID (hero-cta-explore, gavetao-card-*, gavetinha-card-*, edit-button, save-button, video-url-input, add-video-btn, back-button, description-input, title-input).
seed_data_creation: None created beyond backend auto-seed on startup. Test-created description/video/image mutations were cleaned up after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_zantia_api.py cover all endpoints. Frontend Playwright flow validated Home → Gavetão → Gavetinha edit/save/reload with YouTube embed. Image picker (expo-image-picker) was NOT exercised via UI — per task note, only video URL + text were tested for admin edits. Public URL: https://renewable-skills-hub.preview.emergentagent.com (from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL).
